notes: Their main damage was Skylar (23k physical); 3/5 of us itemized armor.
Enemy ran 2/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 3 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane), Goldilocks324 (jungle→midlane), Xeebs (carry→jungle).

notes: 🎮 private (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.
Goldilocks324 (jungle) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
🎮 private (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.
Goldilocks324 (jungle) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
They traded the fight for Fangtooth across the map — we won bodies but gave the objective.
Goldilocks324 (jungle) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
🎮 private (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.
We took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
🎮 private (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.
Goldilocks324 (jungle) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Phase. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
Enemy is 4/5 physical — a single armor item blunts most of their damage; itemize armor on anyone diveable.
Dive threat on our backline: Kallari. Assign peel for the carry and ward the flanks.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Kwang Surge of the Heavens (knockup 0.5s), Countess Feast (suppress 0.75s). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
We have sustain (The Fey) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
ourKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
ourKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
ourKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
ourKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

ourKits.combo: Judgement tether → Surge knockup → Fury of the Heavens slow, recall the blade
ourKits.winCondition: tether a target, knock up and brawl with energized basics
ourKits.playWith: follow-up while he tethers and knocks up
ourKits.playAgainst: bait his blade-recall mobility, then punish when it's placed

ourKits.combo: Pounce → Rumble slow → Boulder Throw → Behemoth ult to brawl
ourKits.winCondition: engage with Pounce, grow with Behemoth and out-sustain the fight
ourKits.passive: ramping health regen for jungle sustain
ourKits.playWith: follow-up damage while he front-lines and CCs
ourKits.playAgainst: anti-heal and kiting beat his sustain brawl; burst him before Behemoth

ourKits.combo: Shadow Slip in → Eventide → Blade Siphon → Feast suppress ult, Haemorrhage true-damage
ourKits.winCondition: Feast-suppress a squishy and delete them with true-damage burst
ourKits.passive: two-ability hits apply a %max-HP true-damage bleed
ourKits.playWith: a team to clean up after her pick
ourKits.playAgainst: Feast is her whole engage — bait it / peel; she's fragile, punish the recast window

ourKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
ourKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
ourKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
ourKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
ourKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

enemyKits.combo: Plasma Grenade → Hypercharge on-hit → Air Assault reposition → Atomiser ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Hypercharge and kite-shoot from Air Assault safety
enemyKits.passive: extra jump; kills cause corpse explosions
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline so she can free-fire airborne
enemyKits.playAgainst: CC her out of Air Assault; she's squishy on the ground

enemyKits.combo: Shadow Walk stealth → Crippling Dagger slow → Shadow Dance gap-close → Guillotine execute ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stealth-pick an isolated squishy and execute with Guillotine
enemyKits.passive: Death Mark detonates for bonus burst
enemyKits.playWith: a team that follows her pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: ward/reveal for the stealth; she's the squishiest hero — any CC kills her

enemyKits.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
enemyKits.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

enemyKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
enemyKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
enemyKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
enemyKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
enemyKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
